data.title: Add manual:awaiting_user constant to planning-tags.conf
data.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Implementation Notes
Create plugins/dso/skills/shared/constants/planning-tags.conf following the exact pattern of figma-tags.conf:
  # Planning pipeline tag constants
  # Consumed by sprint (manual-pause filter) and preplanning (tag emission)
  TAG_MANUAL_AWAITING_USER=manual:awaiting_user

This file is sourced by sprint-next-batch.sh and sprint-manual-drain.sh using:
  source ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/skills/shared/constants/planning-tags.conf

Do NOT source figma-tags.conf in planning-tags.conf — keep them independent.
chmod +x is NOT required for .conf files; they are sourced, not executed.

## TDD Requirement
Structural boundary test — exemption: static config file with no conditional logic (Unit Exemption Criterion 3).
Test verifies file exists and constant is correctly named (structural, not behavior):
  grep -q "^TAG_MANUAL_AWAITING_USER=manual:awaiting_user" plugins/dso/skills/shared/constants/planning-tags.conf

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] planning-tags.conf exists at correct path
  Verify: test -f $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/shared/constants/planning-tags.conf
- [ ] TAG_MANUAL_AWAITING_USER constant is defined with correct value
  Verify: grep -q "^TAG_MANUAL_AWAITING_USER=manual:awaiting_user" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/shared/constants/planning-tags.conf
- [ ] File can be sourced in bash without errors
  Verify: bash -c "source $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/shared/constants/planning-tags.conf && test \"\$TAG_MANUAL_AWAITING_USER\" = 'manual:awaiting_user'"
- [ ] check-plugin-self-ref passes (no hardcoded plugins/dso/ paths in the file)
  Verify: grep -v "^#" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/shared/constants/planning-tags.conf | grep -vq "plugins/dso/"
